name: dk_dec_acc
drl:
rule R1 when accumulate( M(tag == 1, $x : amount); $s : sum($x) ) then end
rule R2 when accumulate( M(tag == 1, $x : amount); $a : average($x) ) then end
rule R3 when accumulate( M(tag == 1, $x : amount); $m : min($x) ) then end
rule R4 when accumulate( M(tag == 1, $x : opt); $s : sum($x) ) then end
rule R5 when accumulate( M(tag == 9, $x : amount); $s : sum($x) ) then end
